column1: # mapping_set_description: DPV <-> ISO/IEC 27001:2022 (Information Security Management System) term alignments. Hand-curated against the lmodel iso27001 LinkML schema (https://w3id.org/lmodel/iso27001/). Connects DPV privacy-governance concepts (risk, audit, controls, organisational/technical measures) to ISMS structural concepts.

column7: ISO/IEC 27001:2022 (data subjects are interested parties of the ISMS)
ISO/IEC 27001:2022 (organisational subset of Annex A controls)
ISO/IEC 27001:2022 (residual risk recorded in treatment plan)
ISO/IEC 27001:2022 (technical subset of Annex A controls)
